summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.model; import org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image; import org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point; import org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Rectangle; public class PolygonObject { private Point p1, p2, p3, p4; public PolygonObject(Image image, int data) { Rectangle rect = image.getBounds(); p1 = new Point(10, rect.height - 8 - data); p2 = new Point(10, rect.height - 14); p4 = new Point(30, rect.height - 8- data); p3 = new Point(30, rect.height - 14); }
